routing.reason: The independent assistant/PWA and Drive findings are packeted and their fixes are consolidated. The complete broad E2E suite must now pass on the merged source before security review, recertification, audit, build, or deployment.

notes: The runtime fix landed at 8cd13fff and remains focused-test verified. A later required broad E2E run exposed independent assistant/PWA and Drive findings, invalidating terminal certification until the consolidated source passes the full suite and is recertified.
